metadata.source_table: Appendix A, Table A-1M, Basic Allowable Stresses in Tension for Metals, SI units
metadata.scope: API 5L X-grade carbon steel pipe and tube rows found in ASME B31.3-2018 Table A-1M.
metadata.intended_use: Private ASME B31.3 pipe thickness web app. Do not publish extracted ASME stress values in a public GitHub repository unless redistribution rights are confirmed.
metadata.extraction_note: The values below are for the base material allowable stress S only. E or Ej, W, Y, corrosion allowance, mill tolerance, and temperature/service restrictions must be handled separately.

note_summaries.51: May require special consideration for welding qualification. For use in ASME B31.3, a qualified WPS is required for each strength level of material.
note_summaries.55: Pipe produced to this specification is not intended for high-temperature service. Stress values apply to either nonexpanded or cold-expanded material in the as-rolled, normalized, or normalized-and-tempered condition.
note_summaries.71: Material is normally microalloyed with Cb, V, and/or Ti. Supplemental purchaser/manufacturer requirements commonly control chemistry, rolling practice, weldability, carbon equivalent, and toughness.
note_summaries.77: CSA Z245.1 pipe grades listed in Appendix A note are considered equivalents to API 5L and treated as listed materials.

lookup_policy.temperature_basis: Use metal/design temperature in °C for ASME B31.3 SI calculation.
lookup_policy.interpolation: Linear interpolation is allowed only between two non-null stress points. For API 5L X-grade rows here, the stress is constant through 200 °C and blank above 200 °C.
lookup_policy.max_temperature_rule: Block automatic calculation above 204 °C for these API 5L X-grade rows. Between 200 °C and 204 °C, show a warning and require engineer confirmation because the SI stress grid stops at 200 °C while the row maximum use temperature is 204 °C.
lookup_policy.psl_rule: PSL1/PSL2 does not create a separate ASME B31.3 basic allowable stress row. Store PSL as procurement/MTC metadata.
lookup_policy.weld_factor_rule: These S values do not include longitudinal weld joint quality factor E/Ej or weld strength reduction factor W. Apply E/Ej and W separately based on pipe manufacturing route, seam type, examination, and temperature.
lookup_policy.minimum_temperature_rule: The min_temp_code such as A must be resolved using ASME B31.3 material temperature/impact testing rules before approving low-temperature service.
lookup_policy.high_temperature_warning: Appendix A Note 55 says API 5L X-grade pipe is not intended for high-temperature service.

checks: All stress_mpa arrays match temperature_grid_c length.
All stress_ksi arrays match temperature_grid_f length.
All API 5L X-grade rows have max_use_temp_c = 204.
Null values intentionally represent blank ASME table cells.
